title: agrostis stolonifera subsp. karsensis
intro: Agrostis stolonifera subsp. karsensis, also known as Kars bent grass, is a subspecies of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Kars bent grass include reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing, making it a valuable herb for treating various skin conditions and injuries. Herbal preparations of Kars bent grass can be found in the form of infusions, decoctions, and salves, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
